repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Based on size of bifolios, texture and color of parchment, and appearance of overtext; but whereas the undertext of Georgian NF M 59 is Armenian, the undertext of this bifolio is Greek
Possible additional bifolio of Georgian NF M 59
Possibly related to contents of Georgian NF 59 (Liturgical collection)
The parchment is stained, dark, and brittle, with losses to each of the edges, and to inner areas of the leaf as well
